chapter_title.en: Stories of people with long lifespans from Arabs and non-Arabs are famous and chronicled in books and history.

text: ومنهم محصن بن غسان بن ظالم الزبيدي،عاش مائتي سنة وستا وخمسين سنة.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: Mohsin bin Ghassan He was also a person who had a long life span. He lived for 256 years.
